title: An Act providing an appropriation for salaries and expenses of the Virgin Islands Board of Elections and the Office of the Supervisor of Elections for
text:
ACT NO.8 89 3
BILL NO. 35-0345
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for salaries and expenses of the Virgin Islands Board of
Elections and the Office of the Supervisor of Elections for the fiscal year October 1, 2024,
through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enactedby the Legislature ofthe Virgin islands:
SECTION 1. The sum of $250,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands during the fiscal year October 1, 2024,
through September 30, 2025, to the Virgin Islands Board ofElections for operating expenses
and any other related costs.
SECTION 2. The sum of $2,500,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands during the fiscal year October 1, 2024,
through September 30, 2025, Office ofthe Supervisor ofElections, for operating expenses and
any other related costs.
0100 GENERAL FUND FY 2025
V.1. BOARD OF ELECTIONS $ 250,000
ELECTION SYSTEMS OF THE V.1. $ 2,500,000
0100 TOTAL GENERAL FUND $2,750,000
SECTION 3. Act No. 8759, as firther amended by Act No. 8784, is amended in
C/CNTR AGENCY/MISC ITEM GVI AUTONOMOUS/SEMI-AUTONOMOUS/DIVISION
line-item VI ELECTIONS PRIMARY AND GENERAL by inserting “Availableuntil February
28, 2025”.

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 354.day of
September, AD., 2024.
&AAA
Novelle E. Francis, Jr.
President
Secretary
Bill No. 35-0345 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This lt’day of October, 2024 A.D.
r
Governor
